statement: In every magma, Equation 1010 (`x = y * ((z * w) * (w * y))`) implies Equation 1698 (`x = (y * x) * ((y * z) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0195
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z w) (op w y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y x) (op (op y z) y))
